headline: Arthur J. Gallagher Deepens Marine Legal Expertise With Mays Brown Deal
summary: Gallagher Bassett has acquired London based Mays Brown Solicitors, a boutique shipping and maritime law firm. The deal extends Arthur J. Gallagher’s marine and legal capabilities across the EMEA region. The move focuses on complex marine and shipping risk, adding niche legal expertise for global clients. For investors watching Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG), this transaction adds another specialized piece to the company’s wider insurance and risk services platform. The stock last closed at...
